visual_description: A man in a police uniform stands with his back to the camera while holding a phone to his ear; nearby a woman and another man look downward. The camera then shifts to a close‑up of a man in a light shirt looking straight ahead with a neutral expression. Finally, a wall‑mounted television displays a news broadcast featuring a figure in white.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in a calm, measured tone, likely delivering a news report, while the room remains quiet.
